title: Author HarnessStaminaProfile typed shape — per-harness rate-limit / wall-clock / session conventions
description:
Per [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]] Layer 5 encumbrance refinement. SessionStaminaCeiling is COMPOSITE — depends on (harness × model × operator-policy). The harness contribution gets its own typed shape. Proposed `HarnessStaminaProfile { harnessSlug, wallClockSessionMaxSeconds: Int?, rateLimitTokensPerMinute: Int?, contextWindowSoftCap: Int?, harnessNativeCostAxes: [enum: wallClock / contextWeight / financial / rateLimits] }`. Per-harness instances: hulk-harness (Claude Sonnet 5h wall-clock + 200K context); codex-harness (different rate-limits + context); apple-pi-harness (no financial / large local context / electricity-only); gemini-harness (Google rate-limits + context). Each harness identity gains a stamina-profile reference. The SessionStaminaCeiling computation is then `combine(HarnessStaminaProfile, AIModelFamilyDNA, OperatorPolicy)`. BLOCKS on inference-control sync-cost audit (read the precedent first).

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- InferenceProvider (inference-account-schemas v0.2.0) — root declaration; carries nested rateLimit + quota + hosting
- InferenceConnection (same) — provider connection metadata
- InferenceRateLimit (same) — rpm/tpm/maxConcurrent ceilings
- InferenceQuota (same) — token-budget ceiling
